title: festuca hervieri var. costei
intro: Festuca hervieri var. costei, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Festuca hervieri var. costei include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and promote the elimination of mucus. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be infused in hot water to make a tea, or it can be dried and used in herbal blends.
